author: doll-agent
content:
Add DType::Struct(&'static [FieldDescriptor]) variant. Using &'static [FieldDescriptor] (slice ref) instead of Arc<[FieldDescriptor]> keeps DType: Copy intact - the static slice is itself Copy. The FerrayRecord derive's existing field_descriptors() -> &'static [FieldDescriptor] is the natural construction site:

    let dt = DType::Struct(<Point as FerrayRecord>::field_descriptors());

Update size_of (sum of field extents), alignment (max field alignment), Display ('struct[(name, dtype), ...]'), promotion ord, casting passthrough, dynarray::cast and zeros (return InvalidDtype since DynArray's Struct variant isn't wired yet). Drop const from size_of/alignment (struct path needs slice iteration). Add Hash to FieldDescriptor.

5 tests covering size, alignment, Display, equality+hash, and the Copy-still-works pin.
